content.en:
Ulun sneered when he saw Ye Tian coming out.

"Hehe, if you hide inside Xuanlin Valley and urge the formation, you can hold on for a while, maybe Luo Xia Pavilion will desperately come to the rescue!

Ulun directly attacked Ye Tian.

However.

Ye Tian directly burst out with power, and his cultivation could no longer be hidden.

The Eighty Percent Realm's Eternal Dao Transformation Cultivation burst out, which shocked Wu Lun.

And Ye Tian's Eternal Dao incarnation body was too terrifying, and the terrifying aura made Wu Lun tremble.

Airplanes!

The eternal sequence of the Ten Perfection Realms permeates the rules of the Dao.

I saw Ye Tian stretch out his hand and shake it, and Ulun's body was frozen.

The next moment.

Bang!

Ulun's body exploded, turned into a blood mist and dissipated, and completely fell and died.

"It's too weak!"

Ye Tian muttered.

When Urun attacked, he saw through the details of Ulun.

Only cultivated a top-notch Mythical Body, and did not superimpose other Mythical Bodies, the combat effectiveness was naturally not strong.

It can be said that Ulun may not be able to beat the First Demon Venerable, after all, the First Demon Venerable superimposes eleven supreme mythical bodies, so the progress of the Eternal Supreme Dao is much less than that of Ulun, but the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule Realm is about the same.

Originally, he thought that the eternal Dao of the Agu Kingdom was very powerful, but now it seems that this is not the case.

However, it's also right to think about it.

It is relatively easy to cultivate in the Ancient Realm, if you take the path of the strongest path or the path of superimposing the body of mythology, how many resources do you have to spend?

In such a selfish kingdom of the ancient realm, which force would cultivate talents like this? unless it was the heir of some eternal realm.

And Ulun has no background, he naturally walks on an ordinary path, and he can be Eternal Dao and comprehend the rules of the Eternal Sequence Dao, and cultivate to break through to the late stage of Eternal Dao, which is very good.

"Maybe the Eternal Dao Realm of the Ancient Realm may not be more powerful than I imagined, maybe it is at the level of the mythical spirit on the other side of the Myth Valley. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

If that's the case, then the Tempest Chamber of Commerce wouldn't have to worry about it.

But.

He killed Ulun, and his strength was inevitably exposed.

If he didn't guess wrong, Luo Wushuang would probably come to talk to him soon.

......

Luoxia Court Headquarters.

Luo Wushuang also saw the scene of Ye Tian killing Ulun through the formation, and was shocked for a while.

"Kill Ulun in seconds, what kind of strength is this!!!!"

Luo Wushuang was shocked.

Such an eternal Daoist powerhouse actually joined Luoxia Pavilion, what is this for?

Is there anything in Luo Xia Pavilion that is worthy of the other party's fear?

If it was said that the other party sincerely joined Luo Xia Pavilion, he would definitely not believe it.

Xuanlin Valley.

Luo Wushuang passed through the formation, and the projection descended here.

"Ye Tian, thank you for saving Xuanlin Valley!" Luo Wushuang thanked first.

"The pavilion master is polite, I am just doing my due duty!"

Ye Tian said.

Then, Luo Wushuang asked, "Ye Tian, I'm curious, with your strength, why did you join our Luoxia Pavilion?"

She knew it was presumptuous to ask, but she had to ask.

Ye Tian smiled and said: "Simple, for the light of Luoxia, I don't have the Eternal Dao Secret Technique, and I have been trapped in the progress of Sixty Percent Nine Eternal Dao. The other forces are too demanding, and it is not easy to obtain the Eternal Dao Secret Technique, and only Luo Xia Pavilion joins to give the Eternal Dao Secret Technique. "

"That's it?"

Luo Wushuang was a little unconvinced.

"That's all!"

Ye Tian nodded affirmatively.

However, Luo Wushuang didn't believe that Ye Tian, such a demonic powerhouse, would not have the Eternal Dao Secret Technique, unless Ye Tian was from a top force, and that force had fallen, Ye Tian had not yet had time to cultivate the Eternal Dao Secret Technique.

Then he hid in Tibet, and only after he could not advance an inch of cultivation did he plan the secret technique of eternal Taoism.

In this way, it is more reasonable.

Of course.

Luo Wushuang didn't continue to ask, Ye Tian gave this reason, she had to believe it if she didn't believe it.

"Ye Tian, I wonder if you can help us deal with the Tempest Chamber of Commerce?" Luo Wushuang asked.

"Dealing with the Tempest Chamber of Commerce?" Ye Tian said: "The Tempest Chamber of Commerce has an Eternal Dao Realm, I can't deal with an Eternal Dao Realm." "

"Ye Tian, I don't need you to deal with the Eternal Dao Realm. There is a rule in the Ao Gu Kingdom that the Eternal Dao Realm is not allowed to deal with strong people below the Eternal Dao Realm, and there will be punishment once it is discovered. Unless you take the initiative to provoke the Eternal Dao Realm, then you will be exempt from punishment. "

Luo Wushuang said.

Ye Tian smiled and said, "I don't believe in any regulations, if the Eternal Dao Realm assassinates you, even if it really falls, who will investigate?"

Luo Wushuang had nothing to say, indeed, if it really fell, no one would offend an Eternal Dao Realm.

Then.

Luo Wushuang said again: "Ye Tian, if you help us solve the trouble of the Tempest Chamber of Commerce, the agreement you signed with us will be automatically canceled. In addition, the light of Luoxia, which is an eternal and Taoist necessity, can be truly obtained. "

"Really obtained?"

Ye Tian asked, "What does this mean?"

Luo Wushuang said: "It means that the inheritance is directly given to you, you can pass it on, and you can even sell it, this is the most valuable item in our Luoxia Pavilion!"

"Okay, I agree!"

Ye Tian said immediately.

If the light of Luoxia can be taught, it will be too important for the human race!

He can't teach the light of Terran Luoxia now, because of the oath.

If he is allowed to teach, he can give the light of Luoxia to the human race, and he can definitely cultivate many Eternal Dao powerhouses, and he can also let his wives and children quickly ascend to the middle stage of Eternal Dao realm.

For the sake of Luo Xia's light, he is willing to offend the Tempest Chamber of Commerce.

"Great!"

Luo Wushuang said excitedly.

"How to deal with the Tempest Chamber of Commerce?" Ye Tian asked.

Luo Wushuang said his plan: "Ye Tian, your strength is very strong, you can easily catch those Eternal Daohua late-stage powerhouses of the Tempest Chamber of Commerce, once the Eternal Daohua late-stage powerhouses of the Tempest Chamber of Commerce are caught, we can force the Tempest Chamber of Commerce to sign a contract agreement, not allowed to deal with Luo Xia Pavilion, and send back the treasure land resources that were snatched back." In this way, the problem is solved!"

"Okay, then do it!

Ye Tian nodded.

Next, Luo Xia Pavilion began to plan.

At the same time, the Tempest Chamber of Commerce also knew about the fall of Ulun!
